title: polanisia icosandra
intro: Polanisia icosandra, also known as the clammyweed, is a plant species in the Nymphaceae family, which is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Polanisia icosandra include its potential to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and support the immune system. Polanisia icosandra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
